title: fix(deps): update module github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger to v0.33.2 - autoclosed
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>go-swagger/go-swagger (github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger)</summary>

### [`v0.33.2`](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/releases/tag/v0.33.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/compare/v0.33.1...v0.33.2)

go-swagger release 0.33.2

***

Released on 2026 Mar 15

#### [0.33.2](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/tree/v0.33.2) - 2026-03-15

Upgraded to go 1.25

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/compare/v0.33.1...v0.33.2>

72 commits in this release.

***

##### <!-- 01 -->Fixed bugs

- fix(dockerfile): re-enacted go binary in docker by [@​fredbi](https://redirect.github.com/fredbi) in [#​3300](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/pull/3300) [...](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/commit/4a76ff83e8dece2a024ac6454a3a8949feef07de)
- fix(codescan): prevent false swagger annotation matches in gRPC protoc comments by [@​lyydsheep](https://redirect.github.com/lyydsheep) in [#​3295](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/pull/3295) [...](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/commit/8d8539a4b6f71c857505ca84aef45a4cae2c91a6)
- fix(generator): skip duplicate validate.Required for aliased primitive $ref fields by [@​lyydsheep](https://redirect.github.com/lyydsheep) in [#​3294](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/pull/3294) [...](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/commit/2cb783c297f87f466fba64fd8007a0f0f518fab3)
- fix(generator): fix missing closing parenthesis in ReadOnly validation template by [@​lyydsheep](https://redirect.github.com/lyydsheep) in [#​3291](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/pull/3291) [...](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/commit/ca28aef98d7097717772627fd4254cb06ce0fab8)
- codescan: fix panic in SetEnum when schema type is not initialized by [@​KingrogKDR](https://redirect.github.com/KingrogKDR) [...](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/commit/43f84ac9865eed3cf03b2f6b266689b4e16f484f)
- fix(codescan): add nil check in isTextMarshaler to prevent panic by [@​lyydsheep](https://redirect.github.com/lyydsheep) in [#​3293](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/pull/3293) [...](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/commit/422d984ff5469d7c8352b04ceb5022e10f257440)
- fix: fixed potential panic in ToGoName by [@​fredbi](https://redirect.github.com/fredbi) in [#​3270](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/pull/3270) [...](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/commit/128f07f06843eb13d00f0a8858907bfa9bf59373)
- fix: Support go-openapi/swag v0.25.x with YAMLMapSlice by [@​echarrod](https://redirect.github.com/echarrod) in [#​3264](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/pull/3264) [...](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/commit/56d93797f729a00d946d92e82633734fc81441f1)
- codescan: fixed panic cases when parsing YAML blocks by [@​fredbi](https://redirect.github.com/fredbi) in [#​3256](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/pull/3256) [...](https://redirect.github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger/commit/31ee5fe2943eb0f55c4951fead507cabaed27360)
